policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-18 - Deny anonymous authentication'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-18 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site authentication enabled
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creation of an app service (such as an Web App, Function App or Logic App v2) that has anonymous authentication enabled. By Enabling App Service Authentication, every incoming HTTP request passes through it before being handled by the application code. It also handles authentication of users with the specified provider, validation, storing and refreshing of tokens, managing the authenticated sessions and injecting identity information into request headers.

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - AuditIfNotExists or Disabled.
